title: Ordering at a Café
description: Practice ordering a drink, handling a small issue, and paying.
communication_goal: Order a drink, handle one complication, and pay politely.

waypoints.name: greeting
waypoints.description: User greets Maya or responds to her greeting
waypoints.detection_prompt: Has the user greeted the barista or responded to her greeting?

waypoints.name: order_placed
waypoints.description: User has placed a specific drink order
waypoints.detection_prompt: Has the user placed a specific drink or food order?

waypoints.name: complication_handled
waypoints.description: User has handled a complication or confirmed their order
waypoints.detection_prompt: Has the user responded to a complication, confirmed their order, or clarified something with the barista?

waypoints.name: payment
waypoints.detection_prompt: Has the user paid, offered to pay, or discussed payment method?

waypoints.name: farewell
waypoints.description: User says goodbye or the interaction concludes
waypoints.detection_prompt: Has the user said goodbye or completed the interaction?

possible_twists.description: The item the user ordered is not available today
possible_twists.example: Sorry, we're out of oat milk today — we have regular or soy. Would either work?
possible_twists.resolution_expected: User changes order or asks for alternative

possible_twists.description: Maya mishears the order and asks for clarification
possible_twists.example: Sorry, did you say a large latte or a small one?

possible_twists.description: The card machine is not working
possible_twists.example: Oh, I'm sorry — our card machine isn't working right now. Do you have cash?
possible_twists.resolution_expected: User offers alternative payment or asks what to do
